product_name: Alanis Women's Raw Edge Slit Skirt
description: Stretch denim is the way to go, and because we believe in comfort with style, this knee-length skirt does exactly just that. Featuring a buttoned closure on the side, a frayed raw edge hem design with dual-tone denim for added edge, and a slit that brings the entire look together. Paired with your favorite heels, boots, or sneakers and a cool blouse this skirt could be the one for all-day everyday wear. Color : Sublime Blue Fabric Content: 96.7% Cotton, 2.2% Polyester, 1.1% Spandex Available Sizes: Regular Sizes 26 to 31. Model Height 5'9", wearing size 26. Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Use mild detergent. Gentle cycle. Do Not Bleach. Tumble dry low. Warm iron if needed.
